entry.title: Appetize
entry.description: Appetize provides browser-based Android and iOS device emulators for app testing and demos.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier includes 1 concurrent session and 100 minutes per month.
caveats: Sessions are limited to 1 per time.

quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free Appetize account.
Upload your Android APK or iOS IPA file.
Configure emulator settings as needed.
Launch the emulator in your browser.
Share the emulator link for demos or testing.
entry.whenToUse: Use Appetize to quickly test or demo mobile apps in a browser without local device setup.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you need unlimited usage, advanced device features, or offline emulation.
entry.body: Appetize offers a simple way to emulate Android and iOS devices in your browser for testing, demos, and debugging, with a free tier suitable for light usage.

entry.title: BrowserCat
entry.description: BrowserCat provides a free headless browser API for automating web page rendering and screenshot tasks.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free API access for headless browser automation and screenshots.
caveats: No advanced browser features (e.g., video streaming)

quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free BrowserCat account at https://www.browsercat.com.
Obtain your API key from the dashboard.
Review the API documentation for endpoint usage.
Send a test API request to capture a screenshot.
Integrate the API into your application or workflow.
entry.whenToUse: Use BrowserCat when you need quick, low-volume browser automation or screenshots without managing your own infrastructure.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you require high request volumes, advanced browser features, or guaranteed uptime for production-critical workflows.
entry.body: BrowserCat offers a free, easy-to-use headless browser API for automating screenshots and simple web rendering tasks, ideal for prototyping and testing.

entry.title: CurlHub
entry.description: CurlHub provides a collaborative API request debugging and sharing platform with a free tier for individuals and teams.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free plan includes core API request logging and sharing features for individuals and small teams.

quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free CurlHub account.
Create a new project for your API testing.
Copy your unique endpoint URL.
Send API requests to the endpoint using curl or your HTTP client.
View and share request logs in the CurlHub dashboard.
entry.whenToUse: Use CurlHub when you need to debug, log, or share API requests with collaborators or for troubleshooting integrations.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid CurlHub if you require unlimited request volume, advanced analytics, or strict data retention beyond the free tier limits.
entry.body: CurlHub is a collaborative API request logging and sharing tool suitable for debugging and lightweight team workflows, with a generous always-free tier.

entry.title: DevToolLab
entry.description: DevToolLab offers a suite of online developer utilities for code formatting, conversion, and quick debugging tasks.

freeTierDetails.summary: Completely free access to all online tools with no registration required.

useCases: Quickly format or convert code snippets
quickstartSteps: Visit https://devtoollab.com.
Select the desired tool from the homepage.
Paste or enter your code or data.
Run the tool to see results instantly.
entry.whenToUse: Use DevToolLab for quick, one-off code formatting, conversions, or debugging without needing to install software.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you need API access, team collaboration, or advanced integrations with your development workflow.
entry.body: DevToolLab provides a collection of free, browser-based developer utilities for formatting, converting, and debugging code or data without registration.

entry.title: Insomnia
entry.description: Insomnia is a cross-platform API client for designing, debugging, and testing REST, GraphQL, and gRPC APIs.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free tier includes core API client features for REST, GraphQL, and gRPC.
caveats: Team collaboration and advanced features require paid plans

useCases: Test REST, GraphQL, and gRPC APIs
quickstartSteps: Download and install Insomnia from the official website.
Launch the app and create a new workspace.
Add your API endpoint and configure request details.
Send requests and inspect responses.
Save and organize requests for future use.
entry.whenToUse: Use Insomnia when you need a user-friendly tool to test, debug, or design APIs locally or in small teams.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you require advanced team collaboration, cloud sync, or enterprise integrations without a paid plan.
entry.body: Insomnia provides a robust, user-friendly interface for testing and debugging APIs, supporting REST, GraphQL, and gRPC with a generous free tier for individuals and small teams.

entry.title: Postman
entry.description: Postman is a collaborative API platform for building, testing, and documenting APIs.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free plan includes core API testing and collaboration features for small teams.
caveats: Advanced collaboration, integrations, and higher usage require paid plans

useCases: Test REST, SOAP, and GraphQL APIs
quickstartSteps: Sign up for a free Postman account at postman.com.
Download and install the Postman app or use the web version.
Create a new workspace and import or define your first API request.
Send requests and inspect responses to test your API.
Save collections and invite teammates for collaboration.
entry.whenToUse: Use Postman to quickly test, debug, and document APIs, especially when collaborating with small teams or open source projects.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you need advanced integrations, large team management, or unlimited monitoring, as these require paid plans.
entry.body: Postman offers a robust free tier for API testing and collaboration, making it ideal for individuals and small teams to build and document APIs efficiently.

entry.title: Requestly
entry.description: Requestly is a browser-based tool for intercepting, modifying, and redirecting network requests for web development and testing.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free plan includes basic request/response modification, redirect, and block rules.
caveats: Team collaboration limited on free tier

useCases: Testing web apps with modified requests
quickstartSteps: Install the Requestly browser extension from the official website or Chrome Web Store.
Sign up for a free account and log in.
Create a new rule (e.g., modify, redirect, or block requests).
Apply the rule and test it on your target website.
Review and manage your rules from the Requestly dashboard.
entry.whenToUse: Use Requestly when you need to quickly intercept, modify, or redirect network requests for web development or debugging.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you require advanced automation, large-scale team collaboration, or server-side request manipulation.
entry.body: Requestly is a browser extension that lets you intercept, modify, and redirect network requests, making it useful for web development, debugging, and testing scenarios. The free tier supports basic rules and is ideal for individuals or small teams needing simple request manipulation without advanced collaboration or automation.

entry.title: Zoho Cliq
entry.description: Zoho Cliq is a team communication and collaboration platform with chat, channels, and integrations.

freeTierDetails.summary: Free plan includes unlimited messages, channels, and 100GB storage for up to 500 users.
caveats: Some advanced features require paid plans
Limited admin controls on free tier

useCases: Integrating with Zoho and third-party apps
quickstartSteps: Sign up for a Zoho account at the official website.
Create your Cliq organization and invite team members.
Set up channels for different teams or projects.
Explore available integrations and connect relevant apps.
Download the desktop or mobile app for easier access.
entry.whenToUse: Use Zoho Cliq when you need a free, easy-to-use team chat platform with basic integrations and generous user limits.
entry.whenNotToUse: Avoid if you require advanced admin controls, enterprise compliance, or deep integrations not supported on the free tier.
entry.body: Zoho Cliq offers a generous free tier for team chat, channels, and basic integrations, making it suitable for small organizations and startups needing streamlined communication.
